---
title: "Publishing Data in Repositories"
format: html
---

### Publishing data

text here

<br>

### Generalist

text here

<br>

### Specialist

text here 

<br>

::: {.commentbox}
::::{.commentbox-header}
Slides
::::
::::{.commentbox-body}
This is the link to the [Data Repositories Lesson]()
::::
:::
 
<br>
 
### Additional resources

EXAMPLE: [Utrecht Bioinformatics Center Zenodo Community](https://zenodo.org/communities/ubc-rdm/) with 4 publications on data stewardship.
